name: Devil May Care
overview: Beans, a Gen Z kid, is sent to a newly gentrified and urban hell, where he works as Devil's social media manager as the two navigate their personal lives while forming an unlikely friendship and making hell the best place to live in the universe.

trailers.title: Devil May Care & Resident Alien Star Alan Tudyk | TZGZ A Part Of SYFY
